libraryFilesRead: Baseline data analysis — source verification deferred

tasks.summary: auto-populate page doesn't exist — 20 types reference it
tasks.details: 20 broken code-docs links point to extending/attributes/auto-populate: AutoPopulateDiscoveryGenerator, PopulateKind, IAutoPopulateRegistry, IAutoPopulateProcessor, IAutoPopulatePopulator, AutoPopulateRegistry, PopulateTimestampAttribute, PopulateFromServiceAttribute, PopulateFromIdentifierAttribute, PopulateFromContextAttribute, TimestampKind, ServiceKind, IdentifierKind, ContextKind, and more. This is a significant undocumented feature for automatic message property population.
TypeSymbolExtensions has <docs> tag pointing here. Page about Roslyn ITypeSymbol extension methods for generator development needs creation.
Extending pages generally have good frontmatter but 10 are missing codeReferences to their corresponding generator/extension source files.

tasks.summary: Code samples across all pages have auto-generated poor metadata

sectionSummary: Extending section (~30 pages) is contributor-focused. Main issue: auto-populate feature is entirely undocumented but has 20 types referencing the missing page. type-symbol-extensions page also missing. All pages have frontmatter but 10 missing codeReferences. No pages missing frontmatter entirely — good structural health.
